releaseNotes: Codex CLI + Codex Desktop can now use third-party endpoints again (DeepSeek, Moonshot, Qwen, OpenRouter) via the restored 127.0.0.1 dual-spoof proxy — translates Codex's Responses-only protocol to Chat Completions, writes ~/.codex/auth.json for v0.130+, supports Microsoft Store Desktop installs via shell URI, and properly handles tool-call grouping + dedup + reasoning items. Also fixes AI Pulse so English News and Star Projects are disjoint instead of identical, and expands EN sources from 6 to 17 (Anthropic, TechCrunch AI, arXiv, Reddit, more).
